codeReview.summary: The fix fully covers the feature contract on current HEAD. The four touched sync stages now coerce fulfilled non-array CCXT mock results to empty arrays, which prevents the reported `undefined.length` and non-iterable crashes in module-test bootstrap paths while preserving normal live-path behavior because the real provider helpers still return arrays.

summary: Reviewed the feature metadata, worker handoff, transcript skeleton, regression-gate skill, commit 36519fa, and current HEAD implementations in the affected sync services. The current branch still satisfies the feature contract, and I found no blocking or non-blocking in-scope issues.
